matchupItemFlags: no armor vs a 3-physical enemy comp

notes: Enemy had 1 healer; only 1 of you carried anti-heal — usually wants two vs a heal comp.
Their main damage was Khaimera (75k physical); 1/5 of you itemized armor — that hurt.
Enemy ran 1/5 on or near their meta core — they were off-meta too, the win was there.

draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Cuban Noobster (midlane→carry).

coaching.headline: A macro loss — towers 2–9, objectives 14–26 — with the backline feeding (Willy 8 deaths, Cuban 5).
coaching.team: Lost the map 2–9 on towers. Willy's Phase died 8 times (his support norm is 3) and Cuban added 5 over his norm of 3 — the backline getting caught repeatedly is how you lose every objective (14–26). The lanes were near-even on pred.gg; this was positioning, not draft. Play tighter around vision.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Backline discipline — 8 and 5 deaths over the norms is the game. Group, ward, and don't get picked before objectives.

perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Phase support, 8 deaths vs your 3 norm — getting caught out as the enchanter loses every fight that follows. Position behind your frontline.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Zinx mid, 5 deaths vs your 3 norm into an unfavored Gadget — too loose; respect the matchup and farm safer.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Feng Mao jungle into a losing Khaimera (43%) — a hard matchup; jungle's your seat but the pick was uphill.
